label_descriptions.Books: Texts related to books, novels, literature, or any written publications.
label_descriptions.Clothing & Accessories: Texts describing apparel, fashion items, shoes, or accessories.
label_descriptions.Household: Texts referring to home goods, kitchen items, cleaning supplies, or domestic products.
label_descriptions.Electronics: Texts about electronic devices, gadgets, appliances, or tech-related items.

topic: ecommerce product classification from text descriptions
task_description: Classifying product descriptions into correct ecommerce product categories based on textual content and context.
